Apple___Apple_scab.symptoms: Dark olive-green spots on leaves and fruits.
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply fungicides and remove infected leaves.
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Improve air circulation and prune regularly.

Apple___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown circular lesions on leaves and fruit rot.
Apple___Black_rot.treatment: Remove infected fruits and apply fungicides.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.treatment: Apply fungicides during early growth stages.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery growth on leaves and shoots.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur-based fungicides and remove infected parts.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Improve air circulation and avoid excessive humidity.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.treatment: Apply fungicides and use resistant hybrids.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.prevention: Practice crop rotation and residue management.

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.treatment: Apply fungicides if infection is severe.
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.prevention: Use resistant varieties and monitor crops regularly.

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Rotate crops and manage crop debris.

Grape___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown leaf spots and shriveled black fruit.
Grape___Black_rot.treatment: Apply fungicides and remove infected fruit.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).treatment: Prune infected wood and improve vine health.
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).prevention: Avoid trunk injuries and sanitize tools.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.symptoms: Dark brown spots and leaf drying.
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.treatment: Apply fungicides and remove infected leaves.
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.prevention: Maintain good airflow within the canopy.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).symptoms: Yellow shoots, mottled leaves, and misshapen fruit.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).treatment: No known cure. Remove infected trees and control psyllids.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).prevention: Use certified disease-free plants and monitor pests.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small dark lesions on leaves and fruit.
Peach___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Apply copper-based bactericides and remove infected material.
Peach___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use resistant varieties and avoid overhead irrigation.

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Water-soaked spots on leaves and fruit.
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Apply copper sprays and remove infected plants.
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use certified seeds and rotate crops.

Potato___Early_blight.symptoms: Dark concentric spots on older leaves.
Potato___Early_blight.treatment: Apply fungicides and remove infected foliage.
Potato___Early_blight.prevention: Practice crop rotation and proper spacing.

Potato___Late_blight.symptoms: Dark water-soaked lesions and rapid leaf collapse.
Potato___Late_blight.treatment: Apply fungicides immediately and destroy infected plants.
Potato___Late_blight.prevention: Use resistant varieties and avoid excessive moisture.

Soybean___healthy.prevention: Maintain balanced fertilization and pest monitoring.

Squash___Powdery_mildew.symptoms: White powdery fungal growth on leaves.
Squash___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply fungicides and remove heavily infected leaves.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.symptoms: Purple spots that develop into scorched leaf edges.
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicides if necessary.
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.prevention: Ensure good air circulation and proper spacing.
